hero.heading2: finish a professional resume in one place
hero.subtitle: Use structured editing, live A4 preview, and AI suggestions to build an application-ready resume faster.

ai.title: 3 expressions can be improved
ai.description: "Responsible for development" lacks action, scope, and outcome. Try "Independently built the export pipeline and reduced generation time by 42%."

features.heading: Build a Professional Resume in Just a Few Steps
features.subtitle: From content creation to layout polish, powered by AI capabilities that make resume building effortless and efficient

items.title: AI Smart Writing
items.desc: LLM-powered resume content generation and polishing. Fill experiences and skill descriptions in one click.

items.title: Beautiful Templates
items.desc: Multiple professional templates such as Light Blue Bar, Cyan Round Icons, and Black Line Minimal. Switch freely and create your own visual style.

items.title: Real-Time Preview
items.desc: A WYSIWYG editor with drag-and-drop sorting, rich text editing, and live A4 paper preview.

items.title: Multi-Format Export
items.desc: Export to PDF, PNG, Markdown, JSON, and more formats for different application scenarios.

items.title: Flexible Layout
items.desc: Flexible modular configuration for profile, education, and work experience, fully under your control.

items.title: AI Diagnosis
items.desc: Analyze resume content, identify potential issues, and receive optimization suggestions.

steps.heading: A Great Resume in Four Steps
steps.subtitle: From zero to finished, a simple and efficient workflow

items.title: Choose Template
items.desc: Pick your favorite style from multiple professional templates

items.title: Fill Content
items.desc: Use AI to quickly complete your resume information

items.title: Fine-Tune
items.desc: Drag modules and adjust styles with every detail under your control

items.title: Export & Apply
items.desc: Export to PDF/PNG in one click, ready to submit

footer.description: Pudding Resume helps you create clear, polished resumes faster.
